summary: Completed comprehensive testing of theme switching functionality for FOMO Arena TG app. All theme-related features working perfectly including light/dark theme switching, logo adaptation, persistence, and cross-page consistency.
passed_tests: Logo displays correctly in TopBar without container
Dark theme applies correctly (dark background #0a0a0f, light text #ffffff)
Light theme applies correctly (white background #ffffff, dark text #070B35)
Theme toggle buttons work in Profile page settings
Theme persists after switching via localStorage ('fomo-arena-theme')
Logo filter adapts correctly (none for light, invert(1) brightness(2) for dark)
Bottom navigation adapts to theme colors
Cards and UI elements adapt to theme via CSS variables
Arena page works with both themes
Duels page works with both themes
Leaderboard page works with both themes
Profile page works with both themes
Theme consistency maintained across page navigation
Smooth theme transitions without page reload
